notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. Stated-vs-actual gap diagnosed across five quoted vectors (scope, budget, SC inertia, RACI diffusion, side-channel workstream). Sponsor typed as weak with chapter-specific counter-move applied (pre-briefing); SC typed as ratifying with chapter-specific coordinator behaviour applied. Three failure modes diagnosed by name (normalised bypasses, diffuse accountability, plus the partial fourth) with quoted evidence for each. Five concrete routing moves with named individuals, cadence, and ownership. Role discipline is explicitly stated AND demonstrated — the closing 'what I am NOT proposing' section names the chapter's red lines. Quotes the chapter directly: 'You do not... try to fix broken governance. You understand it, work within it, and make sure your PM sees it clearly.' Top of the rubric.
